name: Sweetened Groundnut Milk
intro: As you can already gather from the name, this velvety drink is made using groundnuts. It is delicious not only as a refreshing standalone drink but as a replacement for dairy milk in other recipes. For a more neutral taste, you may wish to leave out the sugar/syrup and vanilla.
method: Place groundnuts and water in a food blender and blend on high speed until smooth.
Pour the milk into a pot and add the simmer over medium heat, stirring frequently until it comes to a boil.
